stimuli.label: struggled/scratched
stimuli.intransitive: After the dog struggled the vet took off the muzzle.
stimuli.transitive: After the dog scratched the vet took off the muzzle.

stimuli.label: sneezed/visited
stimuli.intransitive: After the child sneezed the doctor prescribed a course of medicine.
stimuli.transitive: After the child visited the doctor prescribed a course of medicine.

stimuli.label: dozed/watched
stimuli.intransitive: While the man dozed the woman next to him read her book quietly.
stimuli.transitive: While the man watched the woman next to him read her book quietly.

stimuli.label: escaped/attacked
stimuli.intransitive: After the prisoner escaped the guard searched the entire building.
stimuli.transitive: After the prisoner attacked the guard searched the entire building.

stimuli.label: slept/ignored
stimuli.intransitive: While the student slept the professor standing nearby noticed the textbook.
stimuli.transitive: While the student ignored the professor standing nearby noticed the textbook.

stimuli.label: cried/woke
stimuli.intransitive: After the baby cried the mother in the next room came running.
stimuli.transitive: After the baby woke the mother in the next room came running.

stimuli.label: purred/bit
stimuli.intransitive: While the cat purred the owner sitting nearby stroked its fur.
stimuli.transitive: While the cat bit the owner sitting nearby stroked its fur.

stimuli.label: fainted/alarmed
stimuli.intransitive: After the patient fainted the nurse on duty called for assistance.
stimuli.transitive: After the patient alarmed the nurse on duty called for assistance.

stimuli.label: galloped/threw
stimuli.intransitive: While the horse galloped the rider on its back held the reins tightly.
stimuli.transitive: While the horse threw the rider on its back held the reins tightly.

stimuli.label: erupted/destroyed
stimuli.intransitive: After the volcano erupted the residents of the town evacuated immediately.
stimuli.transitive: After the volcano destroyed the residents of the town evacuated immediately.

stimuli.label: sputtered/startled
stimuli.intransitive: While the engine sputtered the mechanic under the hood checked the spark plugs.
stimuli.transitive: While the engine startled the mechanic under the hood checked the spark plugs.

stimuli.label: lied/accused
stimuli.intransitive: After the witness lied the lawyer at the front of the courtroom objected.
stimuli.transitive: After the witness accused the lawyer at the front of the courtroom objected.

stimuli.label: performed/impressed
stimuli.intransitive: While the singer performed the audience in the theater applauded loudly.
stimuli.transitive: While the singer impressed the audience in the theater applauded loudly.

stimuli.label: marched/disobeyed
stimuli.intransitive: After the soldier marched the commander at the base issued new orders.
stimuli.transitive: After the soldier disobeyed the commander at the base issued new orders.

stimuli.label: blazed/trapped
stimuli.intransitive: While the fire blazed the firefighter near the entrance rescued the child.
stimuli.transitive: While the fire trapped the firefighter near the entrance rescued the child.
